title: Teen birth rates hit another historical low in 2025, CDC says
description: The teen birth rate continues its decades-long downward trend. Researchers say many factors are at play, including less sexual activity and more access to contraception and abortion.

title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire amid Israeli attacks on Lebanon
description: Iran says Israel is violating the ceasefire deal President Trump announced, and Tehran appears to still have control over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: U.S. Fertility Rates Drop to Another Record Low
description: The fertility rate has been falling since 2007, in large part because of a plunge among teenagers.

title: Automatic Military Registration for Eligible US Men to Begin in December
description: The change will shift responsibility away from the individual to register and place it with Selective Service, the agency says.

title: Tyrese Haliburton hits important milestone in Achilles injury recovery
description: Tyrese Haliburton took another big step in his recovery on Wednesday.

title: Pam Bondi no longer required to testify in Epstein case
description: Pam Bondi no longer required to testify in Epstein case

title: Yankees’ David Bednar believes velocity dip ‘nothing to panic about’
description: David Bednar struggled again against the A’s, as he allowed a pair of hits and the go-ahead run on a sacrifice fly.

title: Trump threatens ‘bigger, and better, and stronger’ military response if Iran doesn’t comply with deal — or else ‘shootin’ starts’
description: President Donald Trump said all US ships, aircraft, and military personnel would stay in place in and around Iran until it fully complied with a deal.

title: Watch: BBC asks Artemis II crew a question in space
description: The BBC’s Science Editor Rebecca Morelle has spoken to the Artemis II crew ahead of their likely splashdown on Saturday.

title: NASA gears up for Artemis II crew's return to Earth
description: With Artemis II astronauts closing out on-board tests, flight controllers are prepping for reentry and splashdown Friday.

title: Husband detained in Bahamas in connection to wife's disappearance
description: As the search for Lynette Hooker continues near Elbow Cay in the Bahamas, the U.S. Coast Guard is taking the lead on the investigative efforts and has launched a criminal investigation, a U.S. official said.

title: WATCH:  Growing trend of Gen Z men being drawn to Catholicism
description: Young Catholic convert William Bogdan discusses what drew him to the Catholic faith and why he thinks more younger men are joining the church.

title: Trump says US military will remain ‘in, and around, Iran’ until ‘real agreement’ is reached
description: President Donald Trump said that all United States military forces currently deployed in the Persian Gulf “in, and around, Iran” due to Operation Epic Fury will remain in the area until a “real agreement” is reached between the U.S. and Iran. Trump announced the decision in a social media post on his Truth Social account […]

title: UK to urge full reopening of Strait of Hormuz
description: Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper will call for shipping in the Strait of Hormuz to be toll-free and unhindered.

title: Guatemalan man pleads guilty in federal court in crash that killed over 50 in Mexico
description: A man pleaded guilty Wednesday in federal court and acknowledged his involvement in an attempt to illegally smuggle migrants to the U.S. when a truck crashed in Mexico in 2021, killing more than 50.

title: Doctor accused of trying to kill wife on hike found guilty of attempted manslaughter
description: A Hawaii doctor accused of trying to kill his wife on a hiking trail last year has been found guilty of attempted manslaughter in the high-profile trial.

title: Man rescued after two weeks trapped in collapsed Mexico mine
description: A man trapped for nearly two weeks in a flooded gold mine in Sinaloa, Mexico, has been rescued by military divers.

title: Trump slams NATO over Iran after meeting Rutte, renews Greenland threat
description: US president meets NATO chief, expresses disappointment over member states failing to back war on Iran.

title: South Carolina pastor, wife arrested after alleged sexual, physical abuse of foster children
description: A South Carolina pastor and his wife were arrested after a foster child reported that the pastor sexually abused them while at the couple's home.

title: Popular YouTuber among 3 arrested after shouting, ‘He has a gun!’ in packed movie theater for online clout
description: The YouTuber "Fique," who has 1.27 million subscribers, posted a video of himself and a bumbling crew barging into theaters at Landmark Cinemas and screaming "he has a gun!"

title: Jim Whittaker, the first American to summit Mount Everest, dies at 97
description: The celebrated mountaineer, who also served as the first full-time employee of the outdoor retailer REI and later as its president and CEO, died Tuesday at his home in Port Townsend, Washington, his family said.

title: North Korea says its latest weapons tests included missiles with cluster-bomb warheads
description: North Korea said its testing spree this week involved various new weapons systems, including ballistic missiles armed with cluster-bomb warheads, as it pushes to expand nuclear-capable forces.

title: "Ketamine Queen" sentenced to 15 years in prison in connection with Matthew Perry's death
description: In September, Jasveen Sangha pleaded guilty to several federal drug-related charges.

title: Astronaut reacts to naming moon crater after his wife
description: Astronaut reacts to naming moon crater after his wife

title: Massive fire breaks out at Rio de Janeiro’s Olympic Park
description: Rio state military fire department said the blaze was largely confined to the venue’s roof.

title: Democratic presidential prospects flock to New York
description: The Democratic Party’s most ambitious politicians are courting African American activists in New York this week as the party’s unofficial 2028 presidential nomination contest begins to take shape

title: Olivia Munn says ‘obnoxious’ male co-star refused to film scene being saved by woman
description: Munn, who has starred in “The Newsroom” and films like “X-Men: Apocalypse” and “The Predator,” said the issue arose just before cameras rolled.

title: Olivia Munn says ‘obnoxious’ male co-star refused to film scene being saved by woman
description: Munn, who has starred in “The Newsroom” and films like “X-Men: Apocalypse” and “The Predator,” said the issue arose just before cameras rolled.

title: ‘Ketamine Queen’ Sentenced to 15 Years in Matthew Perry’s Overdose Death
description: The sentence for Jasveen Sangha, who prosecutors say was known to customers as the Ketamine Queen, is the stiffest yet for those charged in the “Friends” star’s death.

title: US Marine killed in stabbing during North Carolina street brawl as disturbing video sparks outrage over police response
description: "He was not only dedicated to his country, but also deeply loved by his family."

title: Artemis crew returning to Earth with 'all the good stuff' from Moon discoveries
description: The four astronauts said they were returning to Earth with "so many more pictures, so many more stories".

title: Bessent urges Congress to pass crypto regulation bill - Reuters
description: Bessent urges Congress to pass crypto regulation bill  Reuters

title: Paulina Porizkova says modeling taught her to ‘do as you’re told’ including taking off her clothes
description: Porizkova explained that "being loved for who you are" is something that escaped her until she was 58.

description: Porizkova explained that "being loved for who you are" is something that escaped her until she was 58.

title: Tybee Island teen takeover erupts in panic after police say gunfire broke out along the pier
description: A mass of teens participating in a takeover in Tybee Island, Georgia was interrupted in panic after police say gunfire broke out along the pier.
